div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: Conformance Level 3 — Continuously Auditable (section 7.4.1) — subsumes Level 2

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(26, 26, 26) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
1. Re-decision triggers fire and produce
records on the Charter's declared cadence

div.style: color: rgb(26, 26, 26) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 2. Escalation rule produces records when invoked

div.style: color: rgb(26, 26, 26) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
3. Disclosure metadata blocks carry current
last_reviewed_at per the review cadence

div.style: color: rgb(26, 26, 26) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
4. Schedule of records is queryable and
exportable for counsel and auditor on demand

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: Conformance Level 2 — Mode-Disambiguated (section 7.3.1) — subsumes Level 1

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: Conformance Level 1 — Charter-Conformant (section 7.2.1)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(26, 26, 26) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 1. Charter has reached the fields-completed lifecycle state

div.style: color: rgb(26, 26, 26) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
2. mode_declaration populated with one of three values
(mode-1, mode-2, mode-1-with-embedded-mode-2-summary)

div.style: color: rgb(26, 26, 26) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 3. Schedule of records committed and non-empty

div.style: color: rgb(26, 26, 26) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 4. record_location resolves to a durable surface

div.style: color: rgb(26, 26, 26) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 5. accountable_owner names one human

div.style: color: rgb(26, 26, 26) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 6. re_decision_triggers meets two-class minimum

div.style: color: rgb(26, 26, 26) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 7. escalation_rule populated with a named, exact trigger

div.style: color: rgb(26, 26, 26) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
1. Every decision record carries its
dispatch_mode field

div.style: color: rgb(26, 26, 26) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
2. Every Mode 2 record carries a complete
Article 50 disclosure block (FIVE fields — see Figure 4-1)

div.style: color: rgb(26, 26, 26) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
3. Every Mode 1 edge-case record carries a
per-record disclosure block at the embed point
(reads mode_1_edge_case_flag)

div.style: color: rgb(26, 26, 26) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
4. Schedule sample audit returns no silent drift
(no_silent_mode_drift_in_sample)

div.style: color: rgb(26, 26, 26) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Cumulative rule: a Charter that does not grade
at Level 1 cannot grade at Level 2 or 3.

div.style: color: rgb(26, 26, 26) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: self-declared; the Steward does not certify, grade, or audit.

svg.text: Figure 7-1 — The Three Conformance Levels: Cumulative Criteria (faithful to substrate v5.1.0)
